name: Action Chain
description: Assemble an ActionChain from a list of Actions (built upstream by Cf_TrajectoryAction / Cf_StateChangeAction). Threads the cell state through the chain, validates each action, and emits the assembled chain plus the composite EE planes/polyline for visualisation (one branch per trajectory action).

inputParameters.name: actions
inputParameters.description: Ordered list of Action objects, typically from Cf_TrajectoryAction and Cf_StateChangeAction components.

inputParameters.name: robot_cell
inputParameters.description: Optional RobotCell. When provided, a structural signature is stored on the chain so a mismatched cell on load can be detected via verify_cell().

inputParameters.name: group
inputParameters.description: Planning group name used for the FK visualisation. Defaults to the cell's main group.

inputParameters.name: description
inputParameters.description: Optional free-form description of the chain.

outputParameters.name: chain
outputParameters.description: The assembled ActionChain. Serialisable via to_json / to_jsonstring.

outputParameters.name: planes
outputParameters.description: DataTree of Rhino planes — one branch per trajectory action, one plane per trajectory point. Flatten for a single combined list.

outputParameters.name: polyline
outputParameters.description: List of Rhino polylines — one per trajectory action, through the EE origins.

outputParameters.name: cell_states
outputParameters.description: Flat list of RobotCellState snapshots covering the whole chain — one per trajectory point plus one per state-change action. Pair with an index slider + VisualizeRobotCell to scrub through the entire motion.

outputParameters.name: duration
outputParameters.description: Sum of trajectory durations along the realized path, in seconds. Backends that do not time their trajectories report 0.

outputParameters.name: end_state
outputParameters.description: RobotCellState at the end of the realized path.
